ogTitle: Old Reynella vs Old Teal Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Old Reynella vs Old Teal Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Reynella, South Australia and Old Teal Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Teal Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Old Reynella (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Reynella or Old Teal Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Reynella has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Old Teal Flat scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Reynella scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Old Teal Flat scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Reynella or Old Teal Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Teal Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
